ddls:
CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "path" TEXT /* Path to the image file */,
  "label_id" INTEGER /* ID of the label categorizing the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was uploaded */,
  "uploader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the image */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image */,
  "fabric_type" TEXT /* Type of fabric the image represents */,
  "pattern_type" TEXT /* Specific type of pattern */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_label_id FOREIGN KEY ("label_id") REFERENCES labels ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_uploader_id FOREIGN KEY ("uploader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature set */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the image being analyzed */,
  "dissimilarity" REAL /* Dissimilarity metric for the image */,
  "contrast" REAL /* Contrast metric for the image */,
  "homogeneity" REAL /* Homogeneity metric for the image */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy metric for the image */,
  "correlation" REAL /* Correlation metric for the image */,
  "asm" REAL /* Angular second moment metric for the image */,
  "hue" REAL /* Average hue of the image */,
  "saturation" REAL /* Average saturation of the image */,
  "brightness" REAL /* Average brightness of the image */,
  "edge_density" REAL /* Density of edges in the image */,
  "texture_complexity" REAL /* Measure of the complexity of the texture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the label (e.g., Cap, Dress) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the label's context or category */,
  "parent_label_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent label */,
  "category_type" TEXT /* Type of category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the system */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the image */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "processing_jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each processing job */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being processed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the job (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the processing job */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the processing job */,
  "algorithm_used" TEXT /* Specific algorithm used for processing */,
  "processing_time" TEXT /* Total time taken for processing */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the job failed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_processing_jobs_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image version */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image for which the version is created */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the image */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created or updated */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_versions_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image associated with the metadata */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata entry */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value for the metadata entry */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of metadata */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_metadata_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_analysis_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image associated with the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Details of the analysis report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_analysis_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_analysis_reports_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image associated with the tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "tag_type" TEXT /* Type of tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)
